_note: B6 proof-of-concept family reassignment. Same-size family-byte edits at $03:$4461 (offset $00 of each 43-byte monster-info entry). 'from' is the vanilla family and is validated against the ROM at build time. Mix of in/out of ??? (Boss=9) and between-ordinary-family moves. Dracky(78)->Boss and Slime(8)->Dragon are early-gate catches added to test that NEWLY-OBTAINED monsters show the new family in library/status (snapshot semantics: creation paths stamp $03:$4461 family into struct +$0A, which display reads).
